name: Angela Skills Quest v2 Deployment
description: Deploy Angela Skills Quest challenge system and update GitHub Pages

steps.command: Set-Location C:\workspace\angela-skills-quest; mkdir docs\assets\badges -Force; mkdir docs\data -Force; mkdir docs\challenges -Force; mkdir docs\openclaw -Force; mkdir docs\openclaw\packs -Force; mkdir scripts -Force
Set-Location C:\workspace\angela-skills-quest; git add docs; git commit -m "feat: Angela Skills Quest v2 challenge system"
Set-Location C:\workspace\angela-skills-quest; git push origin main
